signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2.2% YoY (Undershot Forecasts) | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% prior, but fell short of the 2.4% median forecast amid oil price surges from the Iran conflict; core inflation eased to 2.2% from 2.3%.[1][2] Monthly CPI rose 0.3%, below the expected 0.6%.[2]  
This data, released April 2, 2026, pre
